title: Milemark
summary: A location-based website and mobile app for discovering campgrounds, with full access for the backcountry where signal disappears.
lead: Discover campgrounds near you — even when you are off the grid.
overview: Milemark helps people find campgrounds around them with a fast, location-aware mobile experience. The core challenge was the backcountry itself: the places people most want to camp are exactly where cell signal disappears.
We built the app offline-first, so maps and campground data stay available with no connection at all, and tuned it for native-quality performance on both iOS and Android.
highlights: Full offline access — maps and data without any signal
Native-quality performance across iOS and Android

title: Better BC Assessment
summary: A mobile app improving access to BC property assessment data with clear, usable visuals.
lead: Making property assessment data clear, searchable, and genuinely usable.
overview: Better BC Assessment is a mobile app that improves how people access and understand property assessment data — turning dense public records into something readable at a glance.
We focused on clear visualizations and a structure that scales comfortably with large datasets, so the experience stays fast no matter how much data sits behind it.
highlights: Built to scale with large public datasets

title: Exchange Widget
summary: A home-screen currency exchange widget with live rates and quick-glance conversions.
lead: Live exchange rates, right on your home screen.
overview: Exchange Widget brings live currency conversion to the home screen, so the rates you care about are a glance away — no app to open.
Pin your favorite pairs and the widget keeps them current, optimized to stay light and reliable within the constraints of iOS and Android widgets.
highlights: Home-screen widget for iOS and Android
Pin and track your favorite currency pairs

title: True North Prep
summary: A free study app for the Canadian Citizenship Test — practice by category, take weighted mock exams, and track readiness, fully offline on web and mobile.
lead: Prepare for the Canadian Citizenship Test — by category, by mock exam, fully offline.
overview: True North Prep is a free study app for the Canadian Citizenship Test. People practice by category, sit a weighted mock exam that mirrors the real thing, read the study guides, and watch their readiness climb over time.
We shipped it on web and native iOS and Android from a shared foundation, with on-device persistence so every session, score, and study guide stays available with no connection at all.
highlights: Category practice and a weighted, exam-accurate mock test
Readiness and progress tracking persisted on-device
Fully offline across web, iOS, and Android
